# UnitDown AI

> Self-guided HVAC diagnostic and troubleshooting assistant for commercial HVAC technicians, facility teams, and building owners.

UnitDown AI helps technicians diagnose commercial rooftop unit (RTU) faults using symptom-driven AI diagnostics. Users describe what a unit is doing — or not doing — and receive ranked diagnoses, step-by-step field checks, and expected meter readings. The app also stores equipment records (nameplates, specs) and diagnostic logs per unit.

## Features

- AI-powered HVAC symptom diagnosis (ranked results with confidence scores)
- Saved unit records with nameplate data (manufacturer, model, serial, refrigerant type, electrical specs)
- Diagnostic log history linked to individual units
- Equipment timeline (repairs, notes, maintenance events per unit)
- Troubleshooting guides for common commercial RTU faults (free, publicly accessible)
- Brand-specific guides for Lennox, Carrier, Trane, York, AAON, Daikin, Goodman, Rheem (Pro)
- Pro membership for unlimited diagnostics and full guide access

## Public Troubleshooting Guides

- https://unitdown.org/guides/rtu-not-cooling-but-compressor-running
- https://unitdown.org/guides/rtu-blower-motor-hums-wont-start
- https://unitdown.org/guides/high-static-pressure-rooftop-unit-causes
- https://unitdown.org/guides/economizer-stuck-open-symptoms
- https://unitdown.org/guides/rooftop-unit-ignition-lockout
- https://unitdown.org/guides/24v-present-no-contactor-pull-in
- https://unitdown.org/guides/thermostat-calling-but-no-cooling
- https://unitdown.org/guides/float-switch-keeps-tripping-causes
- https://unitdown.org/guides/contactor-buzzing-not-pulling-in
- https://unitdown.org/guides/high-superheat-troubleshooting-chart

- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/lennox-prodigy-m3-lockout-causes
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/carrier-rtu-high-pressure-lockout-reset
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/trane-voyager-trips-on-heat
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/york-simplicity-board-random-shutdown
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/aaon-freeze-protection-alarm-causes
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/daikin-rtu-safety-lockout-reset
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/goodman-commercial-pressure-switch-trips
- https://unitdown.org/brand-guides/rheem-ignition-retry-lockout
